headline: NextEra And Dominion Deal Links Utility Scale With AI Power Demand
summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) has reached an all stock agreement to acquire Dominion Energy in a landmark utility merger. The combined company is set to become one of the world's largest electric utility companies by scale once the transaction closes. The deal is framed around rising power demand tied to AI workloads and data center expansion across the U.S. NextEra Energy, known for its large U.S. utility and renewable power footprint, is moving to absorb Dominion Energy to build a far bigger...
